fields.label: What best describes you?
fields.helpText: Pick the one that fits you best. Most regular people pick the first option.

options.label: Just me — I'm a regular person, freelancer, or self-employed

fields.label: What is your full legal name?
fields.helpText: Your name exactly as it shows on your tax return. First and last name.

fields.label: What is your company or organization's official name?
fields.helpText: The legal name of your business as registered.

fields.label: What is the name of your LLC?
fields.helpText: The official name of your LLC as registered with the state.

fields.label: How is your LLC taxed?
fields.helpText: Not sure? Most single-member LLCs are taxed as sole proprietors — pick C if your accountant said C-corp, S if S-corp, P if partnership.

fields.label: What type of organization are you?
fields.helpText: Just describe it in a few words.

fields.label: What is your street address?
fields.helpText: Where you get your mail. Include apartment or suite number if you have one.

fields.label: Which tax ID number do you want to use?
fields.helpText: If your LLC has its own EIN (Employer ID Number), use that. If not, you can use your personal Social Security Number.

fields.label: What is your Social Security Number?
fields.helpText: Your 9-digit SSN. We need this for tax reporting. It will not be shared with anyone.

fields.label: What is your Employer Identification Number (EIN)?
fields.helpText: Your 9-digit EIN. This is the tax ID the IRS gave your business.

fields.label: Sign your name
fields.helpText: By signing, you confirm that the information above is correct. You can type your name or draw your signature.
